testsuite.name: VersionManagementService 集成测试

testcase.name: 应该成功比较版本差异
应该成功回滚到历史版本
应该成功获取版本列表
回滚后创建新版本应该继续递增

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:59.049 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from rule_versions rv1_0 Hibernate: delete from rule_versions rv1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:59.050 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from rules r1_0 Hibernate: delete from rules r1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:59.051 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - insert into rules (created_at, created_by, enabled, groovy_script, opt_lock_version, rule_description, rule_key, rule_name, status, updated_at, updated_by, version, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into rules (created_at, created_by, enabled, groovy_script, opt_lock_version, rule_description, rule_key, rule_name, status, updated_at, updated_by, version, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-03-29 17:22:59.053 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - select r1_0.id, r1_0.created_at, r1_0.created_by, r1_0.enabled, r1_0.groovy_script, r1_0.opt_lock_version, r1_0.rule_description, r1_0.rule_key, r1_0.rule_name, r1_0.status, r1_0.updated_at, r1_0.updated_by, r1_0.version from rules r1_0 where r1_0.rule_key=?
